name: Horror Tale 1: Kidnapper
short_description: Uncover the mystery behind a terrifying kidnapper in this story-driven horror adventure. Solve puzzles, explore eerie locations, and help Tom and his friends survive in 1990s America. Horror Tale is a creepy escape game full of twists and suspense.
detailed_description:
🎮 Horror Tale 1: Kidnapper – A terrifying mystery adventure where kids are vanishing, and a kidnapper stalks the streets. Will you survive?

Something strange is happening in the town of Lakewitch. Children are disappearing, and a creepy masked kidnapper is lurking nearby. Step into the shoes of Tom as you team up with your friend Harry to uncover the truth, survive the horror, and rescue the missing kids.

🔍 Fortify your treehouse, sneak through dangerous areas, collect items, and solve puzzles as you try to outsmart the villain. This story-driven horror adventure is set in a nostalgic 1990s American town and filled with mystery, suspense, and twists.

🔑 Key Features

  • 😱 Story-driven horror with twists, suspense, and emotional moments

  • 🧠 Escape room-style puzzles, riddles, and hidden objects

  • 🕵️‍♂️ Investigate a mysterious town and uncover the kidnapper’s identity

  • 🧒 Play as kids in the 1990s – build, sneak, survive

  • 🏠 Explore 5 eerie locations: treehouse, street, basement, and more

  • 🎧 Original soundtrack and atmospheric retrowave sound design

Can you escape before the kidnapper gets to you?

supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Arabic, Finnish, Japanese, Korean, Norwegian, Polish, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Swedish, Thai, Turkish, Ukrainian, Malay, Hindi
*languages with full audio support
